For ADHD and other conduct disorders, beneficiaries must have at least one inpatient claim or two 
other non-drug claims of any service type with a related code in any position during the two-year 
reference period. When two claims are required, they must occur at least one day apart. 

You can find more detailed information on the algorithm criteria on the CCW website: 
https://www.ccwdata.org/web/guest/condition-categories
